document.source_title: IPL 2026 | When Jaiswal enjoys his batting, he does well: Sangakkara

claims.claim_text: Jaiswal performs well when he enjoys his batting.
claims.evidence_text: Jaiswal just needs to stay focused, smile, relax and enjoy his batting. Every time he does that, he does well for us.

entities.name: Yashasvi Jaiswal
entities.description: A young cricketer known for his batting skills.
entities.evidence_text: That’s the same with Jaiswal. He does things other batters can’t do, and that is just scoring runs in any condition and against any attack.

entities.name: Kumar Sangakkara
entities.description: Head coach and director of cricket for Rajasthan Royals.
entities.evidence_text: RR head coach and director of cricket Kumar Sangakkara offered a glimpse of how the set-up balances Sooryavanshi’s bursts with Yashasvi Jaiswal’s struggles.

citations.title: IPL 2026 | When Jaiswal enjoys his batting, he does well: Sangakkara

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet covering sports.
